topic: Stop building AI tools. Start building AI processes.
hook_summary: Everyone's obsessed with building AI tools. That's the fastest way to waste $50k.

scenes.audio_text: Everyone's building AI tools. That's the fastest way to waste $50k and 6 months.
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium close-up of @daniel in a dimly lit coffee shop, natural window light from left, candid documentary style, locked-off camera, slightly gritty texture.

scenes.audio_text: I spent a year building an AI scheduler. Flopped. Then I automated my client onboarding with Zapier and GPT-4. Saved 20 hours a week.
scenes.visual_prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot of @daniel at a kitchen counter, laptop open, morning light, slow push-in, natural candid moment.

scenes.audio_text: Process beats product. Automate first, build later. That's the whole thing.
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide shot of @daniel walking on a quiet street, evening golden hour, medium shot, tracking slightly, relaxed confident stride.
